attributes.action: Do not used taxpayers money as a payday for  illegal immegrants
attributes.background: Stop the proposition of paying out £40,000 per family of tax payers hard earned money to illegal immigrants that have already been denied asylum not only is this an insult to taxpayers but could be used as an incentive to come here

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
